name: Final Geas
desc: If a monster(s) with an original Level of 7 or higher is sent from each player's field to the Graveyard this turn: Banish as many monsters from the Graveyards as possible, then you can Special Summon the 1 highest-Level Spellcaster-Type monster among those banished monsters to your field (your choice, if tied).
eff: If a monster(s) with an original Level of 7 or higher is sent from each player's field to the Graveyard this turn: Banish as many monsters from the Graveyards as possible, then you can Special Summon the 1 highest-Level Spellcaster-Type monster among those banished monsters to your field (your choice, if tied).

sets.set: Yu-Gi-Oh! The Dark Side of Dimensions Movie Pack
Yu-Gi-Oh! The Dark Side of Dimensions Movie Pack: Gold Edition
Yu-Gi-Oh! The Dark Side of Dimensions Movie Pack Secret Edition

summoning: Special Summons the player's banished monsters
Special Summons the opponent's banished monsters to the player's field
